title: Spicy Creamy Venezuelan Bamboo Shoot Curry
description: A romantic, creamy curry that pairs fresh bamboo shoots with succulent shrimp in a spicy coconut sauce.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic, sautéing until the onion turns translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the green curry paste and cook for 1 minute to release its aromas.
Add the sliced bamboo shoots and diced bell pepper, cooking for 4 minutes until they begin to soften.
Pour in the coconut milk, fish sauce, and lime juice. Stir well and bring to a gentle simmer.
Add the shrimp to the skillet, covering them with the sauce. Simmer for 5–7 minutes until the shrimp turn pink and are cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Remove from heat and stir in the chopped cilantro.
Serve hot over steamed white rice or quinoa, garnishing with extra cilantro if desired.
